## händische fixes

####Liga falsch angelegt und klassen verkackt.
- Anfrage von Tabelle mit Liga-Id, falscher und richtiger Klasse

correction_leagues = {
  "848"=>	280,
  "849"=>	280,
  "850"=>	300,
  "851"=>	300,
  "852"=>	320
}
- Klassen IDs raussuchen aus settings
im rails production dir
rails c
teams={}
leagues=[falsche ligen]
leagues=correction_leagues
leagues.each {|l| t=Team.where(league_id: l).map(&:id); puts t; teams[l] = t }
teams hat nun die ids sortiert abgelegt.

team_ids=teams.values.flatten
[3498, 3504, 3521, 3522, 3523, 3491, 3481, 3484, 3492, 3524, 3526, 3525, 3499, 3505, 3530, 3493, 3529, 3528, 3494, 3500, 3533, 3534, 3532, 3495, 3501, 3537, 3535, 3536]

correction_teams = {}
teams.map {|k,v| v.each{|x| puts "#{x} #{k} #{correction_leagues[k.to_s]}"; correction_teams[x.to_s] = correction_leagues[k.to_s] }}

SELECT id, license.value as lic
FROM "players" p, jsonb_array_elements(p.licenses) license
where (license.value->>'team_id')::int IN (3498, 3504, 3521, 3522, 3523, 3491, 3481, 3484, 3492, 3524, 3526, 3525, 3499, 3505, 3530, 3493, 3529, 3528, 3494, 3500, 3533, 3534, 3532, 3495, 3501, 3537, 3535, 3536)

SELECT id
FROM "players" p, jsonb_array_elements(p.licenses) license
where (license.value->>'team_id')::int IN (3498, 3504, 3521, 3522, 3523, 3491, 3481, 3484, 3492, 3524, 3526, 3525, 3499, 3505, 3530, 3493, 3529, 3528, 3494, 3500, 3533, 3534, 3532, 3495, 3501, 3537, 3535, 3536)

playerids=[16490,19732,19734,19735,19736,19736,19737,19738,4925,11041,16616,16619,16620,18064,15345,5004,2553,7799,1795,1769,5321,19741,9376,17224,19595,19597,19600,17314,4064,16375,16375,19601,19602,4878,19605,16366,11296,12213,384,7538,16663,19724,14600,19748,19749,19751,8151,19058,17748,10752,1136,10978,5079,19059,7754,17747,17749,11086,19057,4036,10233,19582,19596,18459,16492,19599,18467,15973,13481,15972,18519,18522,9857,18020,19111,7001,16275,15975,7971,14606,9359,16497,16487,14443,16493,16500,16488,2824,3080,15111,7351,796,16668,16667,19742,19750,16409,16614,18547,16617,16612,18515,18516,18517,5807,1570,18518,19690,19692,19731,19733,17923,12395,19619,18493,17353,17744,13716,13716,14138,13246,13246,4014,4014,16374,16374,18811,18811,18026,34,6999,11117,16502,16494,9218,9218,16495,14430,18025,19706,1608,10110,11504,10756,14245,4733,19785,10932,19767,19768,10509,16606,16501,19766,15457,15974,19108,9907,12795,9881,12532,12532,18793,7474,7474,7746,7746,17730,19501,19501,1171,6394,8230,13273,10366,18461,18462,18463,18464,18465,18466,18468,19817,18001,6552,18024,19523,19524,19525,19526,19527,19687,18521,19688,19689,19691,19786,5416,86,6651,19696,19697,19698,19699,19700,19701,19702,18218,19703,19704,19705,19707,3182,14686,2412,3275,14863,9051,8068,9957,127]


players = Player.find(playerids.uniq)

p=players.first

players.each do |p|
  changed = false

  p.licenses.map do |x|
    if team_ids.include?(x['team_id'].to_i)
      x["league_class_id"] = correction_teams[x['team_id']]
      changed = true
      x
    else
      x
    end
  end

  p.save(validate:false) if changed
end
